name: Social Media Strategy
description: Social Media Strategy - Marketing template for channels professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Define Your Strategy Foundation Start with the Strategy tab. Set your goals, target audience, and brand voice for social. This is your north star — every post, comment, and campaign should tie back to this. Step 2: Choose Your Platforms Fill in the Platform Audit tab. Be honest about where your audience actually is — not where you wish they were. Score each platform and commit to 2-3. Step 3: Build Your Content Pillars Define 3-5 recurring themes for your content. These become your content pillars. They keep you focused and give your audience a reason to follow
